## Use Constraints

- Study as a design reference unless the missing root license-file caveat is resolved.
- Review dependency, model, and vector-store licences before reusing code.
- Keep Challenge 2 v1 provenance objects deterministic even when semantic retrieval is enabled.
- Record any upstream license-file change before promoting this from reference to dependency.
